mapper.select: SELECT cd_group_id AS groupId, dtl_cd AS code, dtl_cd_nm AS title, use_yn AS useYn, dtl_cd_abbr_nm AS "detail.abbrName", dtl_cd_desc AS "detail.description", indc_odrg AS "detail.sortOrder", expnsn_str_val1 AS "detail.etcValue1", expnsn_str_val2 AS "detail.etcValue2", expnsn_str_val3 AS "detail.etcValue3", pstng_start_date AS "detail.startDate", pstng_end_date AS "detail.endDate" FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP ORDER BY cd_group_id, indc_odrg, dtl_cd
